value:
dolt port conflict: when two projects share the same dolt port (default 3307), the server started by one project serves the wrong data dir for the other. Symptom: 'database not found on Dolt server'. Diagnosis: check readlink /proc/1370337
1841910
1843908/cwd to see which project's .beads/dolt is being served. Fix: (1) bd dolt set port <unused-port> to assign a unique port per project, (2) update .beads/dolt-server.port to match, (3) start a dolt server manually with the correct --data-dir if bd dolt start picks up the wrong one. Each project should use a distinct port. The wai project was moved to 13421.
